holdings.infoBox: DWM is an equity ETF with a total of 1422 individual holdings. The top holdings are HSBC Holdings stock at 1.60%, Novartis AG at 1.21%, Nestlé at 1.16%, Shell at 1.10%, and Intesa Sanpaolo at 1.09%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree International Equity Fund (DWM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the WisdomTree International Equity index. The fund tracks a dividend-weighted index of dividend-paying companies in developed markets excluding Canada and the US. DWM was launched on Jun 16, 2006 and is issued by WisdomTree.
